query:
SELECT lu.display_name, s.plan, s.status, s.stripe_subscription_id, s.created_at
FROM line_users lu
LEFT JOIN subscriptions s ON lu.id = s.line_user_id
WHERE lu.display_name LIKE '%舞%'
ORDER BY s.created_at DESC
LIMIT 5;
